title: Zantedeschia calyptrata
taxonomy: Zantedeschia calyptrata is classified as a species within the genus Zantedeschia, which is part of the family Arumaceae. This genus is a group of flowering plants commonly known as calla lilies or arum lilies. Zantedeschia calyptrata is native to South Africa, where it can be found in a variety of habitats. The plant is known for its distinctive white flowers and large, green leaves. Through its classification, Zantedeschia calyptrata is closely related to other species within the Arumaceae family.

It has been used in traditional medicine to treat a variety of ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions.
